text: A person who violates Section 502.093 (Annual Permits) commits an offense.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 502. Registration of Vehicles
##### § 502.476 — Annual Permits; Offense

A person who violates Section 502.093 (Annual Permits) commits an offense.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 160, eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.text: A person who violates Section 502.093 (Annual Permits) commits an offense.
